passage_title: Cutty Sark: the fastest sailing ship of all time

sentences.sentence: The nineteenth century was a period of great technological development in Britain, and for shipping the major changes were from wind to steam power, and from wood to iron and steel.
sentences.translation: 19世纪是英国技术大发展的时期；对于航运业来说，主要变化是从风力转向蒸汽动力，并从木材转向铁和钢。

structure.text: was a period of great technological development in Britain
and for shipping the major changes were from wind to steam power, and from wood to iron and steel
from wind to steam power, and from wood to iron and steel

difficult_points: 句子用 and 连接两个层面：英国整体技术发展与航运业的具体变化。
for shipping 表示“就航运而言”，不是目的状语。
from...to... 与 from...to... 并列，分别描述动力和材料的变化。

expressions.text: a period of great technological development

sentences.sentence: The fastest commercial sailing vessels of all time were clippers, three-masted ships built to transport goods around the world, although some also took passengers.
sentences.translation: 有史以来最快的商业帆船是快速帆船，这类三桅船是为在世界各地运输货物而建造的，不过有些也载客。

structure.text: The fastest commercial sailing vessels of all time
three-masted ships built to transport goods around the world
built to transport goods around the world

difficult_points: three-masted ships 是 clippers 的同位说明，解释这类船的特点。
built to transport... 是过去分词短语，说明建造目的。
although 从句补充例外情况：有些快速帆船也载客。

sentences.sentence: From the 1840s until 1869, when the Suez Canal opened and steam propulsion was replacing sail, clippers dominated world trade.
sentences.translation: 从19世纪40年代到1869年，在苏伊士运河开通、蒸汽推进开始取代帆船动力期间，快速帆船主导着世界贸易。

structure.text: when the Suez Canal opened and steam propulsion was replacing sail

difficult_points: From...until... 给出快速帆船主导贸易的时间范围。
when 从句补充说明1869年的历史背景。
steam propulsion was replacing sail 用过去进行时表示当时正在发生的技术替代。

sentences.sentence: Although many were built, only one has survived more or less intact: Cutty Sark, now on display in Greenwich, southeast London.
sentences.translation: 虽然建造了许多这样的船，但只有一艘大致完整地保存下来：卡蒂萨克号，如今在伦敦东南部的格林尼治展出。

structure.text: has survived more or less intact
now on display in Greenwich, southeast London

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，突出存留下来的船很少。
only one 指众多 clippers 中唯一大体完整保存的一艘。
冒号后给出 only one 的具体名称和展出地点。

sentences.sentence: Cutty Sark's unusual name comes from the poem Tam O'Shanter by the Scottish poet Robert Burns.
sentences.translation: 卡蒂萨克号这个不同寻常的名字来自苏格兰诗人罗伯特·彭斯的诗《汤姆·奥尚特》。

structure.text: the poem Tam O'Shanter by the Scottish poet Robert Burns
by the Scottish poet Robert Burns

difficult_points: Cutty Sark's unusual name 是主语，说明本段开始解释船名来源。
comes from 表示名字的出处。
by the Scottish poet Robert Burns 后置修饰 poem，说明作者。

sentences.sentence: Tam, a farmer, is chased by a witch called Nannie, who is wearing a 'cutty sark'—an old Scottish name for a short nightdress.
sentences.translation: 农夫塔姆被一个名叫南妮的女巫追赶，而南妮穿着一件“cutty sark”——这是苏格兰旧语中对短睡裙的称呼。

structure.text: is chased by a witch called Nannie
who is wearing a 'cutty sark'—an old Scottish name for a short nightdress

difficult_points: a farmer 是 Tam 的同位语，解释人物身份。
called Nannie 是过去分词短语，修饰 witch。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，补充女巫的穿着。
破折号后的 an old Scottish name 解释 cutty sark 的含义。

sentences.sentence: The witch is depicted in Cutty Sark's figurehead—the carving of a woman typically at the front of old sailing ships.
sentences.translation: 这位女巫被刻画在卡蒂萨克号的船首像上——也就是通常位于旧式帆船前端的女性雕像。

structure.text: the carving of a woman typically at the front of old sailing ships

difficult_points: is depicted 是被动结构，表示女巫形象被表现出来。
figurehead 指船首像，不是抽象的“名义领袖”。
破折号后解释 figurehead 的具体形态和位置。

sentences.sentence: In legend, and in Burns's poem, witches cannot cross water, so this was a rather strange choice of name for a ship.
sentences.translation: 在传说中，也在彭斯的诗里，女巫不能渡水，因此这对一艘船来说是一个相当奇怪的名字选择。

structure.text: In legend, and in Burns's poem
so this was a rather strange choice of name for a ship
a rather strange choice of name for a ship

difficult_points: In legend 和 in Burns's poem 并列说明这一观念的两个来源。
so 引出结果：船名与女巫不能过水的传说形成反差。
this 指用 Cutty Sark 作为船名这件事。

sentences.sentence: Cutty Sark was built in Dumbarton, Scotland, in 1869, for a shipping company owned by John Willis.
sentences.translation: 卡蒂萨克号于1869年在苏格兰邓巴顿建造，服务于约翰·威利斯拥有的一家航运公司。

structure.text: for a shipping company owned by John Willis

difficult_points: was built 是被动结构，说明建造地点、时间和委托对象。
in Dumbarton, Scotland 与 in 1869 分别表示地点和时间。
owned by John Willis 后置修饰 shipping company。

sentences.sentence: To carry out construction, Willis chose a new shipbuilding firm, Scott & Linton, and ensured that the contract with them put him in a very strong position.
sentences.translation: 为了进行建造，威利斯选择了一家新的造船公司Scott & Linton，并确保与他们签订的合同让自己处于非常有利的位置。

structure.text: chose a new shipbuilding firm, Scott & Linton
and ensured that the contract with them put him in a very strong position
that the contract with them put him in a very strong position

difficult_points: To carry out construction 是目的不定式，说明选择造船公司的目的。
Scott & Linton 是 a new shipbuilding firm 的同位说明。
ensured 后接 that 宾语从句，说明威利斯确保合同条款对自己有利。
put him in a very strong position 表示使他处于强势地位。

expressions.text: put someone in a strong position

sentences.sentence: In the end, the firm was forced out of business, and the ship was finished by a competitor.
sentences.translation: 最终，这家公司被迫停业，而这艘船由一家竞争对手完成建造。

structure.text: the firm was forced out of business
and the ship was finished by a competitor

difficult_points: In the end 引出建造过程的最终结果。
was forced out of business 表示公司被迫倒闭或停业。
the ship was finished by a competitor 是被动结构，说明最终完成者。

sentences.sentence: Willis's company was active in the tea trade between China and Britain, where speed could bring shipowners both profits and prestige, so Cutty Sark was designed to make the journey more quickly than any other ship.
sentences.translation: 威利斯的公司活跃于中英茶叶贸易，在这项贸易中速度能给船东带来利润和声望，因此卡蒂萨克号被设计成比任何其他船更快完成航程。

structure.text: Willis's company was active in the tea trade between China and Britain
where speed could bring shipowners both profits and prestige
so Cutty Sark was designed to make the journey more quickly than any other ship
to make the journey more quickly than any other ship

difficult_points: where 指 the tea trade between China and Britain，而不是 Britain 单独一个地点。
both profits and prestige 是并列宾语，说明速度带来的双重收益。
so 引出设计 Cutty Sark 的原因结果关系。
more quickly than any other ship 表示比较目标是所有其他船。

sentences.sentence: On her maiden voyage, in 1870, she set sail from London, carrying large amounts of goods to China.
sentences.translation: 1870年，在首航中，她从伦敦启航，载着大量货物前往中国。

structure.text: carrying large amounts of goods to China

difficult_points: her 和 she 都指 Cutty Sark，船只在英语中常用阴性代词。
maiden voyage 指首航。
carrying... 是伴随状语，说明启航时装载的货物和目的地。

sentences.sentence: She returned laden with tea, making the journey back to London in four months.
sentences.translation: 她满载茶叶返回，用四个月完成了回伦敦的航程。

structure.text: making the journey back to London in four months

difficult_points: laden with tea 说明返航时满载茶叶的状态。
making... 是现在分词短语，补充说明返程用时。
in four months 表示完成这一航程所花时间。

sentences.sentence: However, Cutty Sark never lived up to the high expectations of her owner, as a result of bad winds and various misfortunes.
sentences.translation: 然而，由于逆风和各种不幸事件，卡蒂萨克号从未达到船主的高期望。

structure.text: the high expectations of her owner
as a result of bad winds and various misfortunes

difficult_points: However 表示与前面首航表现形成转折。
live up to expectations 表示达到期望。
as a result of 引出未达预期的原因。

sentences.sentence: On one occasion, in 1872, the ship and a rival clipper, Thermopylae, left port in China on the same day.
sentences.translation: 有一次，在1872年，这艘船和一艘竞争对手快速帆船“塞莫皮莱号”在同一天离开中国港口。

structure.text: the ship and a rival clipper, Thermopylae
left port in China on the same day

difficult_points: On one occasion 引出一个具体事例。
Thermopylae 是 a rival clipper 的同位语，说明竞争船的名字。
on the same day 强调两船比赛的可比性。

expressions.meaning_zh: 一艘竞争对手快速帆船

sentences.sentence: Crossing the Indian Ocean, Cutty Sark gained a lead of over 400 miles, but then her rudder was severely damaged in stormy seas, making her impossible to steer.
sentences.translation: 穿越印度洋时，卡蒂萨克号领先了400多英里，但随后她的舵在暴风雨海域严重受损，导致船无法操控。

structure.text: Cutty Sark gained a lead of over 400 miles
but then her rudder was severely damaged in stormy seas

difficult_points: Crossing... 是时间或背景分词短语，表示穿越印度洋期间。
gained a lead 表示取得领先优势。
but then 引出意外转折：舵严重受损。
making her impossible to steer 是结果状语，说明损坏造成无法操控。

sentences.sentence: The ship's crew had the daunting task of repairing the rudder at sea, and only succeeded at the second attempt.
sentences.translation: 船员们面临在海上修理船舵的艰巨任务，并且直到第二次尝试才成功。

structure.text: had the daunting task of repairing the rudder at sea
of repairing the rudder at sea
and only succeeded at the second attempt

difficult_points: daunting task 表示令人畏惧的艰巨任务。
of repairing... 修饰 task，说明任务内容。
only succeeded at the second attempt 强调第一次未成功。

sentences.sentence: Cutty Sark reached London a week after Thermopylae.
sentences.translation: 卡蒂萨克号比塞莫皮莱号晚一周抵达伦敦。
difficult_points: a week after Thermopylae 表示比竞争船晚一周到达。
after Thermopylae 后省略了 reached London。
这一句给出上一段比赛故事的结果。

sentences.sentence: Steam ships posed a growing threat to clippers, as their speed and cargo capacity increased.
sentences.translation: 随着蒸汽船速度和载货能力提高，它们对快速帆船构成了越来越大的威胁。

structure.text: posed a growing threat to clippers
as their speed and cargo capacity increased

difficult_points: pose a threat to 表示对某对象构成威胁。
growing threat 强调威胁在不断增大。
as 引导原因或伴随变化，说明威胁增长与速度和载货能力提升有关。

expressions.meaning_zh: 对……构成日益增长的威胁

sentences.sentence: In addition, the opening of the Suez Canal in 1869, the same year that Cutty Sark was launched, had a serious impact.
sentences.translation: 此外，苏伊士运河在1869年开通，也就是卡蒂萨克号下水的同一年，产生了重大影响。

structure.text: the opening of the Suez Canal in 1869
the same year that Cutty Sark was launched

difficult_points: In addition 表示除蒸汽船威胁外还有另一因素。
the opening... 是主语，核心词是 opening。
the same year... 是同位语，补充1869年的关联事件。
had a serious impact 未立刻说明对象，后文会解释影响何在。

sentences.sentence: While steam ships could make use of the quick, direct route between the Mediterranean and the Red Sea, the canal was of no use to sailing ships, which needed the much stronger winds of the oceans, and so had to sail a far greater distance.
sentences.translation: 蒸汽船可以利用地中海和红海之间快捷而直接的航线，而这条运河对帆船毫无用处，因为帆船需要海洋上更强劲的风，因此不得不航行远得多的距离。

structure.text: While steam ships could make use of the quick, direct route between the Mediterranean and the Red Sea
the canal was of no use to sailing ships
which needed the much stronger winds of the oceans
and so had to sail a far greater distance

difficult_points: While 在这里表示对比：蒸汽船能用运河，帆船不能。
be of no use to 表示“对……无用”。
which 指 sailing ships，解释帆船依赖海上强风。
and so 表示结果：帆船必须走更远航线。

sentences.sentence: Steam ships reduced the journey time between Britain and China by approximately two months.
sentences.translation: 蒸汽船把英国和中国之间的航程时间缩短了大约两个月。

structure.text: the journey time between Britain and China

difficult_points: reduced...by... 表示减少的幅度。
journey time between Britain and China 指中英航程耗时。
approximately 表示大约，不是精确的两个月。

sentences.sentence: By 1878, tea traders weren't interested in Cutty Sark, and instead, she took on the much less prestigious work of carrying any cargo between any two ports in the world.
sentences.translation: 到1878年，茶叶商人不再对卡蒂萨克号感兴趣；相反，她承担起声望低得多的工作，在世界上任意两个港口之间运输任何货物。

structure.text: tea traders weren't interested in Cutty Sark
she took on the much less prestigious work of carrying any cargo between any two ports in the world
of carrying any cargo between any two ports in the world

difficult_points: By 1878 表示到这一年时用途已经发生变化。
weren't interested in 说明茶叶贸易不再需要 Cutty Sark。
took on work 表示承担工作。
any cargo between any two ports 强调工作变得普通而不挑货物或航线。

sentences.sentence: In 1880, violence aboard the ship led ultimately to the replacement of the captain with an incompetent drunkard who stole the crew's wages.
sentences.translation: 1880年，船上的暴力事件最终导致船长被一名无能的酒鬼取代，而这个人还偷走了船员的工资。

structure.text: the replacement of the captain with an incompetent drunkard

difficult_points: violence aboard the ship 是事件主语，aboard 表示发生在船上。
led ultimately to 表示最终导致某个结果。
replacement of A with B 表示用B替换A。
who 修饰 an incompetent drunkard，补充此人的行为。

sentences.sentence: He was suspended from service, and a new captain appointed.
sentences.translation: 他被停职，随后任命了一位新船长。
difficult_points: He 指上一句无能且偷工资的船长。
was suspended from service 是被动结构，表示被停职。
a new captain appointed 省略了 was，完整意思是 a new captain was appointed。

sentences.sentence: This marked a turnaround and the beginning of the most successful period in Cutty Sark's working life, transporting wool from Australia to Britain.
sentences.translation: 这标志着一个转折点，也标志着卡蒂萨克号职业生涯中最成功时期的开始：从澳大利亚向英国运输羊毛。

structure.text: a turnaround and the beginning of the most successful period in Cutty Sark's working life
transporting wool from Australia to Britain

difficult_points: This 指任命新船长这一变化。
marked 同时搭配 a turnaround 和 the beginning，说明意义重大。
transporting... 补充说明最成功时期的主要工作。

sentences.sentence: One such journey took just under 12 weeks, beating every other ship sailing that year by around a month.
sentences.translation: 这样的一次航程只用了不到12周，比当年航行的其他所有船只快了大约一个月。

structure.text: beating every other ship sailing that year by around a month

difficult_points: One such journey 指从澳大利亚到英国运输羊毛的一次航行。
just under 12 weeks 表示略少于12周。
beating...by around a month 是结果性分词短语，说明领先幅度。
sailing that year 修饰 every other ship。

sentences.sentence: The ship's next captain, Richard Woodget, was an excellent navigator, who got the best out of both his ship and his crew.
sentences.translation: 这艘船的下一任船长理查德·伍杰特是一位出色的航海家，他能充分发挥船只和船员的最佳水平。

structure.text: The ship's next captain, Richard Woodget
who got the best out of both his ship and his crew

difficult_points: Richard Woodget 是 The ship's next captain 的同位语。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，说明这位船长的能力。
get the best out of 表示充分发挥某人或某物的最佳状态。

sentences.sentence: As a sailing ship, Cutty Sark depended on the strong trade winds of the southern hemisphere, and Woodget took her further south than any previous captain, bringing her dangerously close to icebergs off the southern tip of South America.
sentences.translation: 作为一艘帆船，卡蒂萨克号依赖南半球强劲的信风；伍杰特把她带到比任何前任船长都更靠南的地方，使她危险地接近南美洲南端附近的冰山。

structure.text: Cutty Sark depended on the strong trade winds of the southern hemisphere
and Woodget took her further south than any previous captain
bringing her dangerously close to icebergs off the southern tip of South America

difficult_points: As a sailing ship 表示作为帆船这一身份带来的条件。
depended on 强调帆船对信风的依赖。
further south than any previous captain 是比较结构，突出伍杰特航线更冒险。
bringing... 是结果状语，说明向南航行带来的危险。

sentences.sentence: His gamble paid off, though, and the ship was the fastest vessel in the wool trade for ten years.
sentences.translation: 不过，他的冒险取得了成功，这艘船在接下来的十年里一直是羊毛贸易中最快的船。

structure.text: and the ship was the fastest vessel in the wool trade for ten years

difficult_points: His gamble 指伍杰特冒险走更南航线的决定。
paid off 表示冒险取得回报或成功。
though 插入句中，表示尽管有风险但结果良好。
for ten years 表示这种领先地位持续的时间。

sentences.sentence: As competition from steam ships increased in the 1890s, and Cutty Sark approached the end of her life expectancy, she became less profitable.
sentences.translation: 随着19世纪90年代来自蒸汽船的竞争加剧，并且卡蒂萨克号接近其预期寿命的终点，她变得不那么有利可图。

structure.text: As competition from steam ships increased in the 1890s
and Cutty Sark approached the end of her life expectancy

difficult_points: As 引导背景状语，表示随着竞争加剧。
and 连接第二个背景条件：船只接近使用寿命终点。
she 指 Cutty Sark。
less profitable 表示商业收益下降。

sentences.sentence: She was sold to a Portuguese firm, which renamed her Ferreira.
sentences.translation: 她被卖给一家葡萄牙公司，该公司把她改名为费雷拉号。

structure.text: was sold to a Portuguese firm

difficult_points: She 指 Cutty Sark，was sold 是被动结构。
which 指 a Portuguese firm，说明这家公司改了船名。
renamed her Ferreira 表示将船重新命名为 Ferreira。

sentences.sentence: For the next 25 years, she again carried miscellaneous cargoes around the world.
sentences.translation: 在接下来的25年里，她再次在世界各地运送各种杂货。
difficult_points: For the next 25 years 表示持续时间。
again 呼应前文她曾承担普通货运工作。
miscellaneous cargoes 指各种不同类型的货物。

sentences.sentence: Badly damaged in a gale in 1922, she was put into Falmouth harbour in southwest England, for repairs.
sentences.translation: 1922年，她在一场大风中严重受损，随后被送入英格兰西南部的法尔茅斯港进行修理。

structure.text: Badly damaged in a gale in 1922
was put into Falmouth harbour in southwest England

difficult_points: Badly damaged... 是过去分词短语，说明进入港口维修的原因。
was put into Falmouth harbour 是被动结构，表示船被送入港口。
for repairs 表示目的，即进行维修。

sentences.sentence: Wilfred Dowman, a retired sea captain who owned a training vessel, recognised her and tried to buy her, but without success.
sentences.translation: 退役船长威尔弗雷德·道曼认出了她，并试图买下她，但没有成功；他拥有一艘训练船。

structure.text: a retired sea captain who owned a training vessel
recognised her and tried to buy her

difficult_points: a retired sea captain... 是 Wilfred Dowman 的同位说明。
who owned... 修饰 sea captain，补充道曼的背景。
recognised her 中 her 指 Cutty Sark。
but without success 表示试图购买没有成功。

sentences.sentence: She returned to Portugal and was sold to another Portuguese company.
sentences.translation: 她回到葡萄牙，并被卖给另一家葡萄牙公司。

structure.text: and was sold to another Portuguese company

difficult_points: She 仍指这艘船。
returned 和 was sold 是并列谓语，但一个主动一个被动。
another Portuguese company 表明所有权再次在葡萄牙公司之间转移。

sentences.sentence: Dowman was determined, however, and offered a high price: this was accepted, and the ship returned to Falmouth the following year and had her original name restored.
sentences.translation: 不过，道曼决心已定，并开出了高价；这一报价被接受了，于是这艘船在次年回到法尔茅斯，并恢复了原名。

structure.text: and the ship returned to Falmouth the following year and had her original name restored

difficult_points: however 插入句中，表示道曼虽曾失败但仍坚持。
this 指 Dowman 提出的高价。
冒号后说明高价被接受后的结果。
had her original name restored 是 have + 宾语 + 过去分词结构，表示使原名被恢复。

sentences.sentence: Dowman used Cutty Sark as a training ship, and she continued in this role after his death.
sentences.translation: 道曼把卡蒂萨克号用作训练船；在他去世后，她继续承担这一角色。

structure.text: used Cutty Sark as a training ship
and she continued in this role after his death

difficult_points: used...as... 表示把 Cutty Sark 用作某种用途。
she 指 Cutty Sark，his 指 Dowman。
this role 指 training ship 这一角色。

sentences.sentence: When she was no longer required, in 1954, she was transferred to dry dock at Greenwich to go on public display.
sentences.translation: 1954年，当她不再被需要时，她被转移到格林尼治的干船坞公开展出。

structure.text: When she was no longer required
was transferred to dry dock at Greenwich

difficult_points: When 从句说明从训练船转为展品的时间背景。
was no longer required 表示不再需要她作为训练船。
was transferred 是被动结构，说明船被转移到干船坞。
to go on public display 表示转移的目的。

sentences.sentence: The ship suffered from fire in 2007, and again, less seriously, in 2014, but now Cutty Sark attracts a quarter of a million visitors a year.
sentences.translation: 这艘船在2007年遭遇火灾，2014年又一次受火灾影响但程度较轻；不过现在卡蒂萨克号每年吸引25万名游客。

structure.text: The ship suffered from fire in 2007
but now Cutty Sark attracts a quarter of a million visitors a year
a quarter of a million visitors a year

difficult_points: suffered from fire 表示遭受火灾影响。
again, less seriously, in 2014 补充第二次火灾，且损害较轻。
but now 引出与受损历史形成对比的现状。
a quarter of a million visitors a year 表示每年约25万游客。
